response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong software craftsmanship and polyglot versatility, but is critically misaligned with the core requirements of this role. The job mandates 8 years of C++ experience as a minimum qualifier, yet C++ appears only peripherally in Bogdan's history — a brief stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and a bachelor's thesis project, with C++ absent entirely from his listed skills. He has no demonstrable background in cloud compute infrastructure, distributed systems at the infrastructure layer, or technical leadership in a cloud/DevOps context. His experience skews heavily toward web/application development in TypeScript, DLang, and Node.js, and he is currently in a career gap.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship ethos: consistent application of TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and code quality practices across multiple roles
Experience operating at scale: microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby, demonstrating exposure to high-throughput system concerns
Demonstrated mentoring and knowledge-sharing: workshops, talks, Refactoring Dojos, and Selenium courses show leadership and teaching capability
concerns: Critical C++ gap: the role requires 8 years of C++ experience; the candidate shows only incidental C++ usage with no sustained production track record
No cloud infrastructure depth: AWS CDK usage at Optilyz (pricing config) does not constitute the large-scale cloud compute platform architecture experience the role demands
No cloud/DevOps technical leadership: preferred qualifications require 2+ years mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers; candidate's leadership has been in web/application engineering contexts
